mapper.select: select from eval_graduation_requirement_result where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select count(1) from eval_graduation_requirement_result r left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id

select r.id, r.program_version_id, coalesce(pv.version_name, pv.version_no) as program_version_name, pv.major_id, maj.major_name, r.requirement_id, req.requirement_code, req.requirement_name, r.model_id, m.model_name, r.attainment_rate, r.attainment_value, r.threshold_value, r.warning_flag, r.calc_time, r.lock_flag, r.remark from eval_graduation_requirement_result r left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id
order by r.warning_flag desc, r.calc_time desc, r.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
